payload.description: Structured customer submission as JSON, post-privacy-boundary. May be a loan application, insurance claim, or other inbound event.

event_type.description: One of three values: "loan_application", "insurance_claim", or "unknown". Used by the Orchestrator BPMN to route the submission to the appropriate downstream pipeline.

confidence.description: Confidence score between 0.0 and 1.0. Below 0.70 forces classification to "unknown". Used for governance reporting and threshold-based human review triggers.

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of the signals that drove the classification decision. Required per SR 11-7 model auditability standards.
